HGRCPATH, CARGO_BUILD_RUSTC_WRAPPER, RUSTC_WRAPPER, and MAKEFLAGS missing from exec env denylist — RCE via build tool env injection (GHSA-cm8v-2vh9-cxf3 class).

Missing denylist entries allowed hostile build-tool environment variables to influence host exec commands.

OpenClaw is a user-controlled local assistant. This advisory is scoped to the OpenClaw trust model and does not assume a multi-tenant service boundary.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `< 2026.4.8`
- Patched versions: `2026.4.8`

## Fix

The issue was fixed on `main` and is available in the patched npm version listed above. The verified fixed tree is commit `d7c3210cd6f5fdfdc1beff4c9541673e814354d5`.

## Verification

The fix was re-checked against `main` before publication, including targeted regression tests for the affected security boundary.

## Credits
Thanks @boy-hack of Tencent zhuque Lab (https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard) for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00188, "percentile": 0.085}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-09T14:22:29Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42427"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-09T14:22:29Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/d7c3210cd6f5fdfdc1beff4c9541673e814354d5", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: HGRCPATH, CARGO_BUILD_RUSTC_WRAPPER, RUSTC_WRAPPER, and MAKEFLAGS missing from exec env denylist — RCE via build tool env injection (GHSA-cm8v-2vh9-cxf3 class)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-28T18:29:10Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7437-7hg8-frrw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.8", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2026.4.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: HGRCPATH, CARGO_BUILD_RUSTC_WRAPPER, RUSTC_WRAPPER, and MAKEFLAGS missing from exec env denylist — RCE via build tool env injection (GHSA-cm8v-2vh9-cxf3 class)
